additional_notes: The Illinois Pro Day is confirmed for March 12, 2026 (today), held at the Smith Center / Irwin Indoor Practice Facility in Champaign. As of the time of this search, the event is either currently underway or has just concluded, and NO testing results have been published by any media outlet yet. Expected participants based on pre-event reporting include: EDGE Gabe Jacas (did not do athletic testing at the Combine; this is his primary showcase), OT J.C. Davis (Combine invite, may re-test or throw for Altmyer), QB Luke Altmyer (Combine invite, expected to throw), DT James Thompson Jr. (Wisconsin transfer, Shrine Bowl invitee), OT Melvin Priestly (Grambling State transfer), IOL Josh Gesky (3x All-Big Ten HM), IOL Josh Kreutz (son of Olin Kreutz), WR Hank Beatty (breakout senior WR, punt returner), TE Tanner Arkin (Colorado State transfer), CB/S Miles Scott, S Matthew Bailey (shoulder surgery after regular season; status for Pro Day unclear), LB Dylan Rosiek, and potentially several other Illini seniors. This data should be updated once results are published, likely within 12-24 hours of the event.
